I went to the grocery store down the street today because I ran out of milk.

I wanted to buy some bread, milk, and eggs. But they were out of bread. So I got some tortillas instead.

The cashier was friendly, and we had a quick chat about the weather. Then I walked back home in the rain. It was quite cold, so I made some warm tea as soon as I got inside, sat down on the couch, and read a book for a few hours until it got dark outside.
